69c3f32405bc77265d0e3d40::genz::English.title: CII Says Businesses Are Vibing Again
69c3f32405bc77265d0e3d40::genz::English.description: Okay, so like, Indian businesses are feeling themselves, big time. The CII Business Confidence Index is literally at its highest in like, five quarters. Apparently, everyone's feeling good 'cause the home market is popping off and the government is actually getting stuff done with reforms. Companies are low-key expecting things to get even better, with plans to invest more and hire more people. Basically, India's still the main character when it comes to major economies growing the fastest.

69c3f31605bc77265d0e3d39::genz::English.title: Godrej's Drip is Getting an AI Upgrade, Fam
69c3f31605bc77265d0e3d39::genz::English.description: Okay, so Godrej Enterprises is dropping this new AI thing called Amethyst, and it's gonna be everywhere in their brands and how they do stuff. They're saying it's gonna make their employees way more productive, which is kinda fire. Plus, they're gonna slap agentic AI into their products and how you interact with them. Basically, they're tryna be the main character of the 'intelligence-first' movement. Bet.

69c3f2f605bc77265d0e3d2f::genz::English.title: Fitch: Indian Companies' Revenue Gonna Pop 6% by FY27
69c3f2f605bc77265d0e3d2f::genz::English.description: Fitch is low-key hyped about Indian companies, predicting their revenue will vibe 6% higher by FY27. This glow-up is thanks to the economy still growing and people spending more cash. But, like, watch out for potential US tariffs and the rupee being kinda weak, 'cause that could make things a bit chaotic.
